title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: Claude Opus 4.8 Review: Better At What’s It Good At, Worse At What It’s Not
summary: Anthropic's new flagship aced our math problem and shipped a spotless game—then drained our entire token quota in a single prompt. We ran it through six tests, and here's how it did.

title: OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks
summary: Even with Lockdown Mode, ChatGPT could be still vulnerable to prompt injections, but the goal is to reduce the likelihood that sensitive data gets shared in the process.

title: The Trump administration might take an equity stake in OpenAI
summary: President Donald Trump said he's discussing deals "where the American people can benefit from the success of AI."

title: Anthropic Is Helping the NSA Hack China. It Also Wants Everyone to Pause AI
summary: The company behind Claude embedded engineers at the NSA for offensive cyber ops, then published a report warning AI could soon build itself without humans in the loop.

title: Google will pay SpaceX $920M per month for compute
summary: In a statement, a Google representative described the deal as a result of unexpected demand for its recently launched AI products.

title: Kraken offers SpaceX IPO access through xStocks
summary: Eligible users in more than 110 markets can register for tokenized SpaceX equity ahead of the company's highly anticipated public listing.

title: Pump.fun bounty platform pays users to tattoo tokens and chase viral stunts
summary: Pump.fun launched a new bounty platform where users started funding bizarre memecoin marketing stunts, including forehead tattoos, skydiving as a mascot and setting a vehicle on fire.

title: Supabase doubles valuation to $10B in 8 months
summary: Supabase, an example of an open source project becoming a fast-growing company, has greatly benefited from AI tools like Claude, Codex, and other vibe-coding platforms.

title: The token bill comes due: Inside the industry scramble to manage AI’s runaway costs
summary: "The whole conversation shifted from tokenmaxxing and 'go fast' to 'we need guardrails, how do we control this?'"

title: NASA briefly sheltered space station astronauts in SpaceX’s Dragon due to leaks
summary: The space agency said Roscosmos discovered new leaks in the Russian service module.

title: NSA said to be readying Anthropic’s Mythos for use in cyber operations
summary: The U.S. eavesdropping agency is reportedly preparing Anthropic's Mythos for use in cyberattacks, despite a federal ban on using the AI model maker.

title: JPMorgan, Citi-backed Clearing House plans tokenized deposit network in 2027: WSJ
summary: Some of the largest banks are reportedly launching a tokenized deposit network in early 2027 in response to growing competition from stablecoin companies entering TradFi.

title: Satellite maker Apex’s valuation rises to $2.3 billion after latest $200 million raise
summary:
Apex has raised more than $200 million to expand in-house satellite production capabilities, announcing a funding round June 5 it says nearly doubled the four-year-old manufacturer’s valuation to $2.3 billion.

title: AI Is Already Developing AI, Says Anthropic—And Humans May Be Slowing Things Down
summary: Anthropic says AI now writes most of its code and runs increasingly complex research tasks, leaving people to decide which problems are worth solving.

title: SpaceX to raise at least $75 billion in IPO
summary:
SpaceX plans to raise at least $75 billion in its initial public offering, valuing the company at more than $1.75 trillion.
